titleStmt.title: SII 41.46: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 46. (A.R. No. 45 of 1905.) Perumukkal, Tiṇḍivaṉam Taluk, South Arcot District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the Mukhyachalaesvara temple on the hill.

summary.p: Gift of land by Araichūr-uḍaiyāṉ Uyyavandāṉ •••(name broken) from Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu in Chōḻa-maṇḍalam, for applying sandal paste to the deity on festival days. The donor purchased the land from the ūrār of Perumukkil in Perumukkil-nāḍu in Ōymā-nāḍu alias Vijayarājēndra-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇara puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅkac cayamātu virumpa taṉṉirumalaraṭi maṉṉavar cūṭac ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkaliniṅki meyyaṟaṉ taḻaippakkaliṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalain(ā)ṭātti valaṅkoḷḷāḻi va
ṇṭamitiritiyaṅku cuṭaraḷavu morukuṭai niḻaṟṟi vijaiya simhaāsanattu mukkoṭ kiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripa(ṉ)nmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 8vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattoymānāṭāṉa vijai
yarājentravaḷanāṭṭup perumukkil nāṭṭup paḻamukkil Ūrom coḻamaṇṭalattu nittavinota vaḷanāṭṭu Araicūruṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉ Aḻakiya viṟṟukkuṭutta nirnilamāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai perumā ceṟuvukkum teṉpāṟkellaivāykkālukkum
vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai niṇṟānpaṭṭikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṟkuḷavarampukkut teṟkum Iṉnāṟpāṟkellai Uḷḷum Uṭpaṭanilam paṉṉiraṭikkolāl kuḻi Aiñnūṟum tirumalaimel tiruvāṉmiīśvaram muṭ[aiya mahā]devar tiruvuṟsabhattil kūttāṭun tevar tiru
ccāntu cāttukaikku Aṟṟaināḷaikku veṇṭuṅkuṟaivaṟuppukku nāṅkaḷ Ivaḻakiyatevanukku viṟṟukkuṭuttu Emmil Icainta vilaipporuḷkai Aṟakkoṇṭu vilaikkaṟaviṟṟukkuṭuttom Iṉṉilattukku talainir kaṭainir pāccap peṟuvatākavum cilvari coṟu māṭṭuveṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷ Iṟai
muṟaimaik kāṭṭakkaṭavomallātomāka sammatittu Inta Aḻakiya tevanukku viṟṟukuṭuttom paḻamukkil Ūrom Ūrkkaṇakku kocikaṉ caṭaikoṭan malaikuniya niṉṟāṉ Eḻuttu Itupanmāheśvararakṣai [.]
Digital edition of SII 41.46 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
